title: Reports of cases of TB to UK enhanced tuberculosis surveillance systems 2000 to 2024
body: " Read last year’s annual report, Tuberculosis (TB) notifications reported to enhanced TB surveillance systems: UK, 2000 to 2023.   Read the quality and methodology information for this release.  Other TB reports, including the Tuberculosis in England: national quarterly reports, and other public health information relating to TB, are available at Tuberculosis (TB): diagnosis, screening, management and data.  View the pre-release access list for this report.  The statistical practice of the UK Health Security Agency (UKHSA) is regulated by the Office for Statistics Regulation (OSR). The OSR sets the standards of trustworthiness, quality and value in the Code of Practice for Statistics that all producers of official statistics should adhere to.  Official statistics reports presenting notifications of tuberculosis from the National Tuberculosis Surveillance for England, Wales and Northern Ireland, and from the Enhanced Surveillance of Mycobacterial Infections for Scotland.  "
